[vc_column_text]

Kitchen Range Hood Installation in Denver, Colorado

Hoodbuilder takes the health of your employees, patrons, and the cleanliness of your restaurant extremely seriously. For that reason, we ensure that you only have the best ventilation hoods on the market, and that they are installed with an expert’s touch in Denver, Colorado.

Free Quote 303-777-7720

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column]
[/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-7 vc_col-md-7″][vc_column_text]

Ventilation Hood Installation – Commercial Kitchen

Every commercial kitchen deals with moisture, fumes, heat, odors, and smoke. For this reason, your industrial or commercial kitchen must have the right ventilation system installed to keep the air clean and healthy for your staff and customers. Not having the right ventilation can also lead to a number of fire and safety issues as well as bad marks from the health department.

Key benefits of investing in a range hood include:

Reduce Heat Buildup:

When running a commercial kitchen, one of the biggest issues all facility managers need to deal with is the amount of heat produced due to hours of cooking and food preparation. A commercial range hood system makes it easy to pull all the heat out of the facility in an effective manner. This, in turn, makes the kitchen environment comfortable for employees.

Maintain Indoor Air Quality:

Smoke and other food fumes contaminate the kitchen air, which causes discomfort to the staff. Low air quality also takes a toll on the other areas of the restaurants. Installing a range hood and ventilation system replaces contaminated air with fresh air from outside.

Improve Kitchen Lighting:

The commercial hood has space where you can easily install LED lights. In this way, you will not just increase lighting for great visibility, but you will also cut down on the energy bills.

Have Increased Safety:

Though you should always have fire extinguishers available throughout the facility, what you really need for greater safety is a hood fire suppression system. These fire systems are designed to contain and put out fire long before the fire has a chance to spread to other areas.

Hood Builder takes the health of your employees, patrons, and the cleanliness of your restaurant extremely seriously by offering the best commercial kitchen cleaning and maintenance services. 

For that reason, we ensure that you only have the best ventilation hoods on the market in Denver, Colorado and that they are installed with an expert’s touch. We are your most reliable partner, when it comes to professional hood installation, degreasing of vent hoods, and system maintenance.

Vent Hood Experts at Your Service – Hood Installation

We only employ the most trained and experienced vent hood installation experts. Our technicians will show up in uniform and ready to work. We firmly believe that good customer service helps to provide a premium installation experience. We will get to work quickly, installing your vent hoods so that they operate efficiently for years into the future.

Backed by Our Guarantee

If your vent hoods malfunction for any reason, call us back out and we will perform all service and maintenance required to get the job done quickly with minimal loss to your business. Each one of our products is backed by our guarantee to provide clients with satisfaction and peace of mind.

Unlike many other range hood installers, we never disappear after the procedure has been completed. In fact, we stand firmly behind each product we deal in and install in a commercial kitchen or restaurant facility. Our range hood specialists carry out the entire installation with great attention to detail, so that you don’t have any issues with the functioning of the system. In case you still have any issues, you can always reach out to our Denver office, and we will immediately dispatch our team to resolve the problem with your hoods without any delay.

Why We Are Different in Range Hood Installation and Restaurant Hood Repair

For over 25 years, we have been providing some of the biggest names in the restaurant business with ventilation hood installation services in Denver, Colorado. Choose us and you’ll get fast and efficient service no matter where you are located in the nation. Our installers are some of the best you will find.

Reasons you should choose our services to include:

Expert Installation:

Installation of a commercial range hood is a complicated job, which only experts can handle. Whether it is the removal of the old range hood, locating and marking the vent holes, cutting the siding, attaching the duct, or connecting the wires, our hood installer will perform every step with utmost precision, so as to ensure maximum efficiency and best results.

Best Customer Service:

Our specialists are easy to reach via a phone call or email. You can also directly visit our Denver office for a discussion about the installation, repair, and maintenance of your range hood. We value your precious time and are always eager to help you with expert advice and tips. Hood Builder is your most ideal range hood installation partner.

Certified Installers:

As per the NFPA guidelines, you need to get the installation done by qualified and certified technicians. The entire procedure needs to be carried out in an accurate and safe manner. Our certified installers perform the job while adhering to all the safety measures to avoid danger.

Free Quote:

If you run a commercial kitchen and need to install a high quality range hood in the facility, you can reach out to us for a free estimate of the project. We value transparency more than anything else.

At Hood Builder, you can count on us to get your vent hoods installed on your timetable and at a price you can easily afford.

Consult with a Range Hood Design Specialist

As a facility manager or restaurant owner, you should always ensure a safe and healthy atmosphere for your kitchen staff and visitors. If you plan to invest in the right type and top quality of commercial range hoods, you should head over to Hood Builder, which operates in Denver, CO. Based on the size and layout of your facility, our experts will custom-design a range hood to match your specific needs. Our professionals are highly trained and qualified to install all kinds of ventilation hoods and exhaust hood systems to improve appeal and safety.

To get a free quote, feel free to give one of our specialists a quick phone call or write us an email using the contact form.

 

Free Quote 303-777-7720

We’ve got you covered. Hood Builder is a leading distribution, fabrication, and installation company for food facilities of any size. We have offices and plants across the United States that are ready to tend to your needs.

If you intend on receiving quotes from other installers in the industry, please be sure to compare the items included in the package in addition to price and reputation. Our objective is to always be your obvious choice. Please fill out the form below and and we will prepare a quote.
